headline: Chip Stock Bounce Back Leads Nasdaq Climb
summary: A reignited chip stock rally is driving the Nasdaq and S&P 500 higher. The Nasdaq is up 1% while the S&P 500 has gained 0.6%. The chip stock rally marks a bounce from last week’s losses with some of the semiconductor names that were under pressure driving today's gains.
